textPlain: Has anyone done benchmarks of 64bit memory on the current implementations? There's the potential for performance regressions there because WASM implementations could exploit the larger address space of 64bit hosts to completely elide bounds checks when running 32bit WASM code, which doesn't work if the WASM address space is as big as the hosts.
This looks like a great release! Lots of stuff people have wanted for a long time in here.
